risk_watch.note: African swine fever remains a high-consequence supply-chain and trade risk; APHIS updates are the preferred public reference.
Mexico, Japan, Canada, South Korea, China/Hong Kong and Colombia should stay visible because partner mix drives carcass value.
Feature activity and activity index help show whether cutout strength is meeting retail support.
ERS and WASDE revisions to pork production, price, and export forecasts should be tracked as a dedicated monthly module once the parser is added.
